search_queries_used: site:doh.gov.ae Standard Day Surgery Procedure Service assessment suitability
site:rcoa.ac.uk GPAS day surgery suitability screening
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Day surgery anesthesia screening
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Day surgery anesthesia screening
rejection_reasons: Suitability depends on patient, procedure, facility, anesthesia, social support, and clinician judgment.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients considered for planned day surgery or procedure services.
setting_applicability: Direct for DoH-licensed Abu Dhabi day-surgery services; other settings require local policy.
UAE_applicability: Verified through the DoH V1/2024 standard.
recency_verification: Current DoH V1/2024 standard effective March 2025 was reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer DoH standard was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact DoH section supports patient assessment, risk, investigations, consent, suitability, and an individualized care plan for day surgery without automatic clearance.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Day surgery anesthesia screening; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Automatic eligibility, procedure selection, anesthesia technique, social-support sufficiency, admission, discharge, and referral decisions remain unsupported.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
